name: app-two-audience
description: The two-audience reference app (epic #255): a React app on the memory adapter (zero DB) running vike-auth's default user guard plus two named guards (staff `admin`, customer `client`) with zero cross-talk. Drives the downstream 'which subject' seam (#207 P3): vike-storage is bound to the admin guard (storageGuard: 'admin'), so a staff upload is owned by the `admins` subject. Org ownership (#250) + a Vue twin land in later phases.
